content: agent1: working on Fix Resource Leak in Shell Completion (unclosed file contexts). Will touch src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context) and possibly src/click/core.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent1: I already edited _resolve_context in src/click/shell_completion.py to wrap ctx = cli.make_context(...), cmd.make_context(...) (non-chain), and cmd.make_context(...) (chain) in 'with' statements (var names: ctx, sub_ctx, sub_sub_ctx) so contexts auto-close (fixes ResourceWarning on File options). I did NOT touch core.py. Please rebase your validate_nesting changes on top of that structure, or let me know if you want to merge differently.
